rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports, and in implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model scope in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Generate AGREE contracts with type-consistent expressions and valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid AADL data types and visible identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not reference event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless explicitly defined as data ports.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
